---
title: "Zach Holmes"
name: "Zach Holmes"
image: "/images/profile_pics/zach_holmes.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Mechanisms of fruit-tracking by avian frugivores in a novel ecosystem"
location: "**Research location:** Hawaii"
dates: "**Dates:** 2024-present"
category: "Current"
category_order: "3"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
